wine_schools.name: Hochschule Geisenheim University
wine_schools.description: State-recognised viticulture university in Geisenheim with around 1,350 students across degree programmes including the Viticulture and Enology BSc and the Vinifera EuroMaster MSc consortium with French, Spanish, Italian and Portuguese partners.
courses_offered: Viticulture and Enology BSc (German-language)
International Wine Business BSc (English-language)
Viticulture, Enology and Wine Business MSc
Vinifera EuroMaster joint MSc with EU partner universities
VITIS-VINUM double Master with Torino, Udine and Geisenheim
wine_schools.price_range: Tuition-free state programmes; semester fees apply

wine_schools.name: Kloster Eberbach Guided Tours and Wine Seminars
wine_schools.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_schools.description: Programme of guided abbey tours and wine tastings at the 1136 Cistercian monastery in Eltville, ranging from spontaneous weekend tours to private group seminars on Rheingau Riesling and Cistercian wine history.
courses_offered: Spontaneous weekend monastery tour with tasting
Public scheduled wine seminars
Customised group seminars with wine accompaniment
Vinothek and WineBar1136 tasting flights
wine_schools.price_range: Public tours and tasting flights from low double-digit EUR; private group bookings on request

wine_schools.name: Rheingauer Weinkonvent
wine_schools.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_schools.description: Member-driven Rheingau wine convent founded 1971 with seat at Kloster Eberbach, organising regular wine seminars, tastings and estate visits for around 650 members. Open to outside guests by invitation through member estates.
courses_offered: Member wine seminars on Rheingau viticulture
Estate visit tastings across member growers
Wine history talks at Kloster Eberbach

wine_schools.name: Weingut Robert Weil Private Wine Tastings
wine_schools.description: Moderated private tasting programme at the Robert Weil estate in Kiedrich, with structured flights from estate dry to noble-sweet wines from the Kiedricher Graefenberg site. Designed for small groups, by appointment.
courses_offered: Moderated estate Riesling flight
Vertical Graefenberg tasting
Pradikat-spectrum tasting from Kabinett to Trockenbeerenauslese
wine_schools.price_range: Private tasting on request; small-group pricing per person

wine_schools.name: vhs Wiesbaden Wine Courses
wine_schools.description: Adult-education wine programme at the Volkshochschule Wiesbaden, the city's continuing-education institution. Course catalogue includes themed Rheingau and exotic-wine evenings and food-pairing seminars.
courses_offered: Themed Rheingau wine courses
Exotic wines course
Food-and-wine pairing evenings

wine_schools.name: Schloss Johannisberg Cellar Tours and Wine Seminars
wine_schools.description: Estate tasting programmes at Schloss Johannisberg, including the Desire on Riesling tour with cellar visit and the Bibliotheca Subterranea, the underground library that holds 25,000 bottles dating to 1748.
courses_offered: Desire on Riesling cellar tour with wine tasting
Group tastings of three, five or seven wines
Bibliotheca Subterranea cellar visits
wine_schools.price_range: Tasting flights for groups of ten or more; cellar tour for bus groups of 40 or more
